title: Present tense — regular verbs
summary: Drop the -en from the infinitive and add an ending that matches the subject.

body.text: German verbs change their ending depending on who does the action. For a regular verb like **wohnen** (to live), take the stem **wohn-** and add the ending.
heißen and kommen follow the same pattern: ich heiße, du kommst.

title: sein (to be)
summary: sein is irregular and extremely common — learn all six forms by heart.

items.de: Wer bist du? — Ich bin Anna.
items.en: Who are you? — I am Anna.
